# Eligibility and Minimum Order

Acme Shop provides a bulk order option aimed at businesses, non-profits, educational institutions, and government agencies. To qualify, customers must provide documentation such as a business license or proof of affiliation. The minimum order quantity is usually 100 units per product, but this may vary. Interested customers are encouraged to contact Acme Shop's bulk order team for guidance on the process, potential discounts, and delivery times, which typically range from 7 to 14 business days.

[Source: bulk_orders.md#eligibility-and-minimum-order]
